title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 22 2023

section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 22 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures tight by 1.53%. The main contract I2401 rose to 995 in late trading and eventually closedat 993.5. The speculaƟve demand of traders has decreased; The fear of heights in steel mills has increased, and the overall wait-and-see sentiment in the market is relatively high, resulting in poor market transactions.
